mapper.update: update episode_log set anime_id = #{animeId}, user_anime_id = #{userAnimeId}, episode_no = #{episodeNo}, episode_title = #{episodeTitle}, content = #{content}, mood_tag = #{moodTag}, score = #{score}, is_highlight = #{isHighlight}, watched_at = #{watchedAt} where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: delete from episode_log where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select el.id, el.anime_id, el.user_anime_id, el.episode_no, el.episode_title, el.content, el.mood_tag, el.score, el.is_highlight, el.watched_at, el.created_at, a.name as anime_name, a.cover_url from episode_log el left join anime a on el.anime_id = a.id where el.user_id = #{userId} and el.anime_id = #{animeId} order by el.episode_no asc, el.created_at desc

select el.id, el.anime_id, el.user_anime_id, el.episode_no, el.episode_title, el.content, el.mood_tag, el.score, el.is_highlight, el.watched_at, el.created_at, a.name as anime_name, a.cover_url from episode_log el left join anime a on el.anime_id = a.id where el.id = #{id} and el.user_id = #{userId}

select el.id, el.anime_id, el.user_anime_id, el.episode_no, el.episode_title, el.content, el.mood_tag, el.score, el.is_highlight, el.watched_at, el.created_at, a.name as anime_name, a.cover_url from episode_log el left join anime a on el.anime_id = a.id where el.user_id = #{userId} order by el.watched_at desc, el.created_at desc

select el.id, el.anime_id, el.user_anime_id, el.episode_no, el.episode_title, el.content, el.mood_tag, el.score, el.is_highlight, el.watched_at, el.created_at, a.name as anime_name, a.cover_url from episode_log el left join anime a on el.anime_id = a.id where el.user_id = #{userId} and el.is_highlight = 1 order by el.watched_at desc, el.created_at desc
